title: Import a Large WordPress Database with WP‑CLI
description: WP‑CLI is often the fastest way to import huge WordPress dumps. Here’s the safest workflow.
author: SQLSplit

content.text: If phpMyAdmin fails, WP‑CLI can import large databases without a browser timeout.
Related: **WordPress Database Too Large to Import?**

content.title: Make WordPress imports painless
content.text: Split your database before WP‑CLI import.

faq.question: Is WP‑CLI faster than phpMyAdmin?
faq.answer: Yes. It runs on the server without browser timeouts.
